text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After Inari One rests for a few days, the people of
her hometown invite her to a festival, hoping for
her swift recovery.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Up until now, Inari One has been worried about
disappointing her hometown, and it's lead to her
fixating on her race results. But her fears
disappear after seeing the town's support.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She remembers that for a festival to have style, it needs passion. It needs soul.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And that soul has to come from her. After all, this is her festival—her fight for the top.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her spirits renewed, Inari One is ready to keep
working toward her goal so she can turn the
Arima Kinen into the best festival ever!
